findings.name: Application is debuggable
findings.description: Application has debugging enabled, allowing attackers to attach debuggers and inspect runtime data.
findings.recommendation: Set android:debuggable="false" in release builds.

findings.name: AWS Access Key ID
findings.description: Hardcoded aws access key id found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: AWS Secret Key
findings.description: Hardcoded aws secret key found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: Private Key
findings.description: Hardcoded private key found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: AWS Access Key ID
findings.description: Hardcoded aws access key id found in application.
findings.recommendation: Remove secrets from code. Use platform-specific secure storage.

findings.name: Application allows backup
findings.description: Application data can be backed up via ADB, potentially exposing sensitive data.
findings.recommendation: Set android:allowBackup="false" or use android:fullBackupContent with encryption.

findings.name: Exported Activity without permission
findings.description: Activity '.ExportedActivity' is exported without permission protection, accessible by other apps.
findings.recommendation: Add android:permission to restrict access or set exported="false".

findings.name: Exported Activity without permission
findings.description: Activity '.MainActivity' is exported without permission protection, accessible by other apps.
findings.recommendation: Add android:permission to restrict access or set exported="false".

findings.name: Exported Service without permission
findings.description: Service '.ExportedService' is exported without permission protection, accessible by other apps.
findings.recommendation: Add android:permission to restrict access or set exported="false".

findings.name: Exported Content Provider without permission
findings.description: Content Provider '.ExportedProvider' is exported without permission protection, accessible by other apps.
findings.recommendation: Add android:permission to restrict access or set exported="false".

findings.name: Cleartext traffic allowed
findings.description: Application allows cleartext HTTP traffic, exposing data to network interception.
findings.recommendation: Set usesCleartextTraffic="false" and use HTTPS exclusively.

findings.name: Google API Key
findings.description: Hardcoded google api key found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: Hardcoded Password
findings.description: Hardcoded hardcoded password found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: OAuth Client Secret
findings.description: Hardcoded oauth client secret found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: Vulnerable library: okhttp 3 (CVE-2021-0341)
findings.description: OkHttp: Certificate pinning bypass due to hostname verification flaw in OkHostnameVerifier.
findings.recommendation: Upgrade okhttp to 4.9.1 or later.

findings.name: Google Cloud API Key
findings.description: Hardcoded google cloud api key found in application.
findings.recommendation: Remove secrets from code. Use platform-specific secure storage.

findings.name: SendGrid API Key
findings.description: Hardcoded sendgrid api key found in application.
findings.recommendation: Remove secrets from code. Use platform-specific secure storage.

findings.name: Hardcoded encryption key
findings.description: Cryptographic issue: Hardcoded encryption key.
findings.recommendation: Use platform-provided secure cryptographic APIs.

findings.name: Exported Broadcast Receiver without permission
findings.description: Broadcast Receiver '.ExportedReceiver' is exported without permission protection, accessible by other apps.
findings.recommendation: Add android:permission to restrict access or set exported="false".

findings.name: Low minimum SDK version (19)
findings.description: App supports Android SDK 19 (< 23/Android 6.0), missing runtime permission model.
findings.recommendation: Increase minSdkVersion to 23+ for runtime permissions and modern security features.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: Camera access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.CAMERA' (Camera access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: SMS read access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.READ_SMS' (SMS read access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: SMS send access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.SEND_SMS' (SMS send access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: Contacts access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.READ_CONTACTS' (Contacts access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: Fine location access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION' (Fine location access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: Microphone access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO' (Microphone access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: Phone state access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE' (Phone state access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: Call log access
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.READ_CALL_LOG' (Call log access).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: Dangerous permission: External storage write
findings.description: App requests dangerous permission 'android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE' (External storage write).
findings.recommendation: Verify this permission is necessary. Request at runtime with clear user justification.

findings.name: SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW permission
findings.description: App can draw over other apps, potentially used for tapjacking/overlay attacks.
findings.recommendation: Remove unless essential. Google Play restricts this permission.

findings.name: Missing network security config
findings.description: No custom network security configuration. Relying on platform defaults.
findings.recommendation: Add a network_security_config.xml to enforce certificate pinning and cleartext restrictions.

findings.name: Generic API Key/Token
findings.description: Hardcoded generic api key/token found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: Firebase Database URL
findings.description: Hardcoded firebase database url found in application strings.
findings.recommendation: Remove hardcoded secrets. Use Android Keystore or environment-based configuration.

findings.name: Vulnerable library: okhttp 3 (CVE-2023-0833)
findings.description: OkHttp: Information disclosure via HTTP/2 connection coalescing allows requests to wrong host.
findings.recommendation: Upgrade okhttp to 4.9.3 or later.

findings.name: Generic Bearer Token
findings.description: Hardcoded generic bearer token found in application.
findings.recommendation: Remove secrets from code. Use platform-specific secure storage.

findings.name: Staging/internal URL found
findings.description: Application contains staging or internal URLs that should not be in production.
findings.recommendation: Remove all staging/dev/test URLs from production builds.

findings.name: Cleartext HTTP endpoint
findings.description: Application contains cleartext HTTP URLs.
findings.recommendation: Use HTTPS for all network endpoints.

findings.name: Insecure random
findings.description: Cryptographic issue: Insecure random.
findings.recommendation: Use platform-provided secure cryptographic APIs.

findings.name: Base64 encoding as pseudo-encryption
findings.description: Cryptographic issue: Base64 encoding as pseudo-encryption.
findings.recommendation: Use platform-provided secure cryptographic APIs.

findings.name: Custom task affinity set
findings.description: Custom task affinity may enable task hijacking attacks (StrandHogg).
findings.recommendation: Remove taskAffinity or set to empty string to use default.

findings.name: Hardcoded IP address
findings.description: Hardcoded IP address found — makes infrastructure changes difficult.
findings.recommendation: Use domain names instead of hardcoded IP addresses.

findings.name: Localhost reference
findings.description: Localhost/127.0.0.1 reference found — likely debug leftover.
findings.recommendation: Remove localhost references from production builds.

findings.name: MD5 hash usage
findings.description: Cryptographic issue: MD5 hash usage.
findings.recommendation: Use platform-provided secure cryptographic APIs.
